# Packs Extensions

Install and manage community or organization-authored extension packs.

## kiri pack

Federated pack library - install...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri pack [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri pack init`](#kiri-pack-init) - Scaffold a new pack from the in-repo...
- [`kiri pack install`](#kiri-pack-install) - Install a pack from a local path, a git...
- [`kiri pack list`](#kiri-pack-list) - List installed packs.
- [`kiri pack publish`](#kiri-pack-publish) - Publish a pack as a GitHub Release.
- [`kiri pack validate`](#kiri-pack-validate) - Validate a pack's manifest + tree.

### kiri pack init

Scaffold a new pack from the in-repo...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri pack init [OPTIONS] NAME
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `NAME` | New pack directory name (kebab-case). | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--dir` | Where to create the new pack. Default: ./packs/<name> in the kirimana repo, else ./<name>. | no | . |  |

### kiri pack install

Install a pack from a local path, a git...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri pack install [OPTIONS] SOURCE
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `SOURCE` | Source. Prefix decides: ``gh:owner/repo@version`` → GitHub Release; ``http(s)://`` / ``git@`` / ``ssh://`` → git clone; otherwise → local path. | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--install-dir` | Override the default install dir (~/.kirimana/packs/). | no |  |  |
| `--ref` | Git ref (branch, tag, SHA) when installing from a git URL. | no | main |  |
| `--force` | Overwrite an existing install of the same pack. | no | False |  |
| `--token` | GitHub token override for ``gh:`` installs of private releases. Defaults to $GH_TOKEN, then $GITHUB_TOKEN. Public releases install without a token. | no |  |  |

### kiri pack list

List installed packs.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri pack list [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--install-dir` | Override the default install dir (~/.kirimana/packs/). | no |  |  |
| `--verify` | Re-hash each installed pack and flag tampering. | no | False |  |

### kiri pack publish

Publish a pack as a GitHub Release.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri pack publish [OPTIONS] PACK_PATH
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `PACK_PATH` | Path to the pack directory. | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--repo` | GitHub repository slug ``owner/name`` to publish to. The release is created at tag ``pack-v<version>``. | yes |  |  |
| `--out-dir` | Where to write the tarball + .sha256 sidecar. Default: ``<pack-path>/dist/``. | no |  |  |
| `--token` | GitHub token override. Defaults to $GH_TOKEN, then $GITHUB_TOKEN. Required unless --dry-run. | no |  |  |
| `--target-commitish` | Commit / branch the release tag points at. Default: GitHub uses the repo's default branch HEAD. | no |  |  |
| `--force` | Replace an existing release at the same tag. Releases are immutable by convention - bump version instead unless you know what you're doing. | no | False |  |
| `--dry-run` | Build the tarball + .sha256 locally and skip all GitHub calls. Useful for verifying determinism + inspecting tarball contents. | no | False |  |
| `--skip-validate` | Skip ``kiri pack validate`` before tarballing. Discouraged - publishing a broken pack burns the version forever. | no | False |  |

### kiri pack validate

Validate a pack's manifest + tree.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri pack validate [OPTIONS] PACK_PATH
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `PACK_PATH` | Path to a pack directory. | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--strict` | Apply the official-registry bar (≥1 source/silver/gold + non-empty domains/classifications). | no | False |  |
